arts.sum: Chelsea stormed to a 3-0 win over West Ham on Saturday to continue a bright start to the season under new boss Enzo Maresca, with Mikel praising the display of a Blues midfielder.

Chelsea vs Barrow – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host Barrow in the third round of the Carabao Cup on Tuesday evening as Enzo Maresca’s team looks to continue their momentum. A strong win at the weekend has lifted spirits around Chelsea, who will be targeting this competition as a realistic avenue to silverware in 2024/25. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca favourite finally set for Chelsea opportunity as plan outlined
arts.sum: If we simply judge a team, or player because of the way they play or they win, but we also need to understand that Kiernan was the main player at Leicester. Chelsea fans have seen very little of Dewsbury-Hall in action since his summer transfer from Leicester City, where he was such an instrumental part of the side that Maresca guided back to the Premier League at the first time of asking.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea injuries, Carabao Cup importance, Mykhailo Mudryk chance
arts.sum: I said many times, the only thing we need to pay attention to is how we can improve and I think we are progressing, we are in the right direction but we just started two months ago. The Blues head coach, 48 hours after his side's win against West Ham United in the Premier League, previewed his team's cup tie with his players in strong form.

arts.ttl: Malo Gusto and Romeo Lavia injury update as Enzo Maresca offers fresh Chelsea boost
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has been forced to deal with several injury concerns in the early weeks of the season, including club captain Reece James as well as Malo Gusto and Romeo Lavia. Maresca confirmed that Gusto is in line to return following the injury, while Lavia remains sidelined for the time being.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make Nicolas Jackson decision as major transfer change expected
arts.sum: The striker has scored four times in five Premier League games so far this season, but reports claim that Chelsea still have a four-man shortlist to add to their striking options. FL says : Jackson’s form and performances so far this season means that Chelsea are no longer in desperate need for a striker; there could however be a problem if the 23-year-old picked up an injury.
